headline: 2 Reasons to Like TTD (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Shareholders of The Trade Desk would probably like to forget the past six months even happened. The stock dropped 46.6% and now trades at $19.71. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: The Trade Desk: The Market Can't Ignore Strong Profits Forever
summary: The Trade Desk looks deeply discounted with strong growth and 30%+ EBITDA margins. Click for this updated look at TTD stock and see if it is right for you.
